summary.bullet: Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience designing and delivering secure, scalable cloud-native applications and distributed microservices across healthcare, regulated, and enterprise domains.

Strong background in secure design principles, code review governance, and implementing layered security controls to ensure reliability, testability, and maintainability across cloud-native applications in financial services and regulated environments.

Experienced in collaborating with cross-functional teams, including product managers, compliance stakeholders, and business units, to translate user requirements into compliant, production-ready solutions aligned with mortgage operations and lending workflows.

Proven track record of increasing unit test coverage, enforcing coding standards, and improving system resilience through disciplined SDLC, TDD practices, and structured change management with minimal disruption during releases.

Adept at leveraging AI tools across the development lifecycle to enhance code quality, automate validation, and accelerate secure feature delivery while driving technical innovation and process improvements.

skills.category: JAVA, Python, JavaScript, Typescript, R, SAS, C#, C++, Go
Spring Boot, Microservices, Hibernate, Junit, JPA, Django, FastAPI, Express, Node JS, Docker, Kubernetes, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, TensorFlow
CosmoDB, Mongo dB, Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, SQL Server
Azure (Data Factory, Databricks Synapse Analytics, Event Grid), AWS (Athena, Kinesis, Cloud Formation, Cloud Watch, SageMaker)
CI/CD, PyTorch, GitHub, Docker, Airflow, Kafka, Spark, Jenkins, Github Actions, SonarQube, Databricks, Snowflake, WebLogic, Redis
HTML5, CSS3, Angular JS, Redux, React JS, jQuery, REST Api's, Bootstrap, D3.js, Material UI
Tableau, Power BI, SAS OnDemand, R Studio, Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)

certifications.item: AI 501 Introduction to AI (Non-Degree GVSU Course)

job.title: Data Scientist (SDE)
job.company: Grand Valley State University (Kirchoff College of Nursing)

bullets.bullet: Architected and executed the full migration of a legacy Microsoft Access database to a redesigned MySQL relational schema, reengineering data models, indexing strategies, and normalization logic, improving query performance by more than 70% and reducing projected platform replacement costs by 10,000$ while preserving institutional workflows.
Engineered full-stack analytics platforms using React JS, Next.js, and D3.js with Django and FastAPI backends, improving stakeholder KPI visibility and reducing manual reporting time by 40%.

Designed and implemented REST APIs with layered security controls including role-based access, JWT validation, and database-level constraints, reducing unauthorized data access risks by more than 50%.

Directed all data operations for the college, supervising a team of 4 across reporting, analytics, and database management, implementing documentation standards that reduced request turnaround and improved data quality by 45%.

Debugged and patched a critical parsing flaw in the RISmed R package, contributing a merged PR to the global open-source repository that immediately improved data acquisition accuracy for 200+ internal researchers and the broader R community.

job.title: Data Analyst
job.company: Grand Valley State University (Charter Schools Office)

bullets.bullet: Automated the entire charter school performance reporting cycle integrating Google Maps API for geographic peer matching with R and Tableau, reducing manual efforts from 3 weeks to 2 days for 50+ schools influencing $2M+ funding allocation.

Designed and maintained a production-grade data pipeline with built-in validation, error handling, and monitoring, reducing data processing time by 30% while improving data accuracy by 25%, eliminating 15+ hours of weekly manual reconciliation.

Elevated system reliability to 99.5% uptime by overhauling backend API architecture with Java Spring and Hibernate, implementing connection pooling, lazy loading, and caching strategies that reduced API latency by 25% and eliminated recurring timeout failures impacting 10,000+ daily active users.

Secured and streamlined deployment by implementing SSO authentication with AWS tokens with env-specific domains, cutting access-related support tickets by 30% and simplifying access control across dev, UAT, and production environments.
Led a frontend team of 5 engineers, proactively coordinating across design, backend, and QA to eliminate delivery bottlenecks, accelerating project timelines by 30% and reducing sprint overruns.

Built a library of 30+ reusable, responsive ReactJS components with Redux and modern CSS frameworks, developing interactive web tables that handled 10x larger datasets with sub-second render times, improving frontend scalability.

Established a comprehensive testing and error-handling framework across frontend (Enzyme) and backend (JUnit, Mockito, Powermockito), reducing production defects by 30% and saving an estimated 200+ engineering hours per quarter previously spent on hotfixes and emergency patches.

Profiled and re-engineered backend service layers using Java Spring MVC, with caching, pagination, query optimization across RESTful APIs, & built CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins, Git, resulting in 99.5% deployment success rate across 30+ prod releases.

Designed a localStorage-driven state management layer in React JS with JSON serialization, expiry-based cache invalidation, ensuring seamless data persistence across a multi-step workflow and eliminating 100% of redundant data entry issues.

degree.name: Master of Science in Data Science & Analytics
Bachelor of Technology in Mechanical Engineering

project.name: AI Awareness Session
project.description: Delivered an executive-level presentation demystifying Generative AI, RAG, and Agentic AI systems for non-technical healthcare stakeholders.

project.name: Robust EEG Decoding
project.description: Developed a distributionally robust deep learning framework using Wasserstein Gradient Flow to improve EEG signal classification under noisy data conditions.

project.name: Polyp Identification System
project.description: Engineered a full-stack CNN-based colonoscopy video analysis tool enabling real-time polyp detection with interactive D3 visualizations.

project.name: DynamicDeepLearn
project.description: Designed an adaptable neural network architecture with dynamic layers and transfer learning benchmarks to optimize performance across image datasets.

awards.item: Dean's Scholarship at Grand Valley State University
